name: English Toffee Balls
recipeIngredient: 3 1/2 ounce package vanilla instant pudding and pie filling
3/4 ounce each chocolate coated English toffee, powdered sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. In a large bowl, cream together the powdered sugar, butter, and pudding mix.
3. Sift flour into a measuring cup; level off. Stir in milk, vanilla, and crushed toffee bars into the creamed mixture until well combined.
4. Shape the dough into one-inch balls.
5. Place on ungreased cookie sheets.
6. Bake for 13-18 minutes or until edges are light golden brown.
7. Cool. Dip top of cookie in powdered sugar.
